title: stipagrostis oranensis
intro: Stipagrostis oranensis, also known as Oran grass, is a type of desert grass species native to North Africa and the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stipagrostis oranensis include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
